title: Velvety Indian Rice Krispies Stir-fry
description: A fresh and velvety vegan dish featuring rice krispies whisked into a spicy vegetable stir-fry that's perfect for sick-day meals.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add chopped bell peppers, onions, and cook for another 5 minutes until vegetables are softened.
Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a simmer. Let the mixture reduce for about 3-4 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Fold in Rice Krispies gently with a spatula while stirring continuously to avoid breaking them up too much.
Season with salt to taste and sprinkle sesame seeds on top of the stir-fry.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
